name: Van der Linde Gang || RDR2
description:
˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗

Can you believe I made another bot so soon? I was going to wait and release this later, but we already hit 300 followers and I wanted to say thanks!!!

I couldn't quite decide where I wanted to start with Red Dead bots, so I figured why not make the Van der Linde Gang? I love immersing my personas into the world and involving side characters, so I tried balancing this to include the whole gang. I am sorry in advance to non-proxy users, I will eventually make some individual bots that aren't as token heavy!

˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗

All of these prompts are set in the era of the Clemens Point camp ( because it's arguably the best. )

I somehow created 9 introductions, clearly I was eager to make this. I tried my best to involve plenty of characters across introductions, but you can always veer it in any direction you'd like.
Prompts labeled {est} mean that your character is an established gang member. {ne} means nothing is established. Of course, change them however you'd like!

★ 1. The gang is robbing a train, and you look like the most promising prize. {ne}
★ 2. After some heavy drinking, Bill starts a barfight. Arthur and John are there to try and stop it and Karen is there to encourage it. {ne}
★ 3. Charles fluff {ne}
★ 4. Hunting trip with Charles and Arthur {est}
★ 5. Karen, Tilly, and Mary-Beth are taking {{user}} with them into town for some shopping and some scheming. {est}
★ 6. The gang is gathered to celebrate {{user}}'s birthday {est}
★ 7. Dutch is scheming with Hosea over the Grays and the Braithwaites and wants {{user}}'s input {est}
★ 8. Molly has been shelved by Dutch long enough that she's drunk and inviting {{user}} to join {est}
★ 9.To get away from camp for a while, Sadie and Abigail bring {{user}} out to Rhodes only to be confronted by some Lemonyne Raiders {est}
★ 10. DIY

˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗

★★Content Warning★★
This bot is set in 1899. Please be careful with your limits. There are chances of violence, murder, SA, racism, homophobia, misogyny, etc.
Just remember, you control the conversation. If you find things uncomfortable, you can always steer away from them!
★★★★★★★★★★★★★★

˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗


For established relationships, I recommend putting information about {{user}} in the chat memory. I usually do something simple like the following.

Name:
Nickname:
Age:
Pronouns:
Extra Info:

In extra info, put information like past history or relationships,
creator: sarah27
